Internal Deal Memo  
Project Codename: Operation Blue Lagoon

Date: 25 October 2023

To: Dr. John Tan Wei Ming  
From: Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah  
Cc: Mr. Ramasamy Muthu

Subject: Acquisition of Quantum Dynamics Pte. Ltd.

This memo outlines the key terms of the proposed acquisition of Quantum Dynamics Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 202312345Z). The transaction involves a purchase price of SGD 8,500,000, as specified in the Sale and Purchase Agreement (the "SPA"). Please note that the project plan is still in its preliminary stage and does not reflect the final project status.

Dr. Tan will oversee the due diligence process, while Ms. Aishah is responsible for coordinating with legal advisors. Mr. Muthu will handle the financial assessments. All communication should be directed to Dr. Tan at +65 6123 4567 or john.tan@company.sg.

For internal tracking, please use the reference ID: https://example.sg/user/S2345678Z. Ensure that all documentation aligns with our internal protocols. The SPA and other relevant documents will be circulated once finalized. 

Please do not disclose any information regarding Operation Blue Lagoon until the acquisition is publicly announced.
